task_completion.description: Navigate to the time entries or timesheet page for the 'Software Migration' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the time entries list or timesheet specifically for the 'Software Migration' project.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific time entries for user 'junior_dev' logged under the 'Design' activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a list or filtered view displaying time entries for the user 'junior_dev' with the activity currently set to 'Design'.

task_completion.description: Select the target time entries to be modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes or selection indicators are checked next to the 5 time entries belonging to 'junior_dev'.

task_completion.description: Change the activity of the selected entries to 'Development'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bulk edit screen, dialog box, or inline-edit dropdown is visible where the 'Activity' field is being set to 'Development'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the activity for 'junior_dev' entries has been successfully updated to 'Development'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The updated time entries list shows that the 5 entries for 'junior_dev' now display 'Development' in the activity column, with no 'Design' entries remaining for this user.

task_completion.description: Ensure no other users' entries or logged hours were modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time entries list shows that the hours logged for 'junior_dev' remain the same as before, and entries for other users (e.g., 'admin') remain untouched (still showing 'Design' if applicable).

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the application's UI elements (buttons, dropdowns, forms) rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual timesheet web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows a functional web application interface with proper styling, navigation menus, and URLs, not a local text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are not open in the final screenshots showing the updated time entries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: 'junior_dev'. Target Project: 'Software Migration' (identifier: 'software-migration'). Initial Activity: 'Design'. Target Activity: 'Development'. Target Count: Exactly 5 time entries need to be changed. The VLM should verify that exactly 5 entries for 'junior_dev' are changed to 'Development', while 3 distractor entries for 'admin' must remain completely unchanged.
